prompt:
Remove the rebuild-dev shell alias from home/dev.nix. It's no longer needed since klaus handles the update pipeline to cosmo directly.

The alias is on line 51 of home/dev.nix. Remove the entire line:
      rebuild-dev = "if [ -e /etc/NIXOS ]; then sudo nixos-rebuild switch --flake . --override-input klaus path:$HOME/hack/klaus; else nix run home-manager -- switch --flake . --override-input klaus path:$HOME/hack/klaus; fi";

Keep the rebuild alias intact. The shellAliases block should just contain the rebuild alias afterward.
